title: T-020 — ROOT: FA detail page shell group (fa_detail + fa_right_panel prototypes) (NPD-a)
prompt:
# T-020 — ROOT: FA detail page shell group

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §3, §5 + UX prototypes/design/01-NPD-UX.md fa_detail + fa_right_panel
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:300-452 (fa_detail + fa_right_panel)

## Type
T0-root — workflow descriptor only. NOT executable. Defines the group of slice tasks that together translate the FA detail page shell (tabs container + right panel) prototype into production. Tab content lives in T-023..T-028.

## Scope (this descriptor)
This task describes the FA detail shell group and points to atomic slice tasks. Do not implement any code under this task — implementation occurs in the slices listed below.

## Slice tasks under this root
- T-136: UI slice — FA detail page shell + tabs container (fa-screens.jsx:300-401)
- T-137: UI slice — FA right panel sidebar (fa-screens.jsx:404-452)
- T-138: WIRING — wire shell + right panel + tabs into FA detail layout/route
- T-139: PARITY — Playwright screenshot parity vs fa-screens.jsx:300-452 + axe checks

## Workflow contract
1. Slices T-136 and T-137 execute in parallel; each ships its own RTL tests + component files.
2. T-138 executes after T-136 + T-137 complete; assembles shell + right panel under the FA detail layout/route.
3. T-139 executes after T-138; runs Playwright parity vs the prototype and axe-violations check.

## Out of scope (root level)
- No production code lives at the root.
- Tab content is implemented in T-023..T-028.
- Modals are implemented in T-021/T-022.

## Acceptance (root)
- All listed slices closed.
- T-138 wiring task closed with page rendering right panel always visible, tabs switching without reload, and right-panel actions opening correct modals.
- T-139 parity task closed with Playwright screenshot + axe artifacts attached.
